crime.value: Multiple murders committed by the narrator's alien sister
crime.quote: when he opened her room door all you seen was blood, guts and bones

victim.value: Multiple unnamed victims found as remains in the sister's room, plus a boy she lured away
victim.quote: all you seen was blood, guts and bones

closed_world.value: The family home where the alien sister lives and commits murders
closed_world.quote: she came to this familly to kill and rule the house

culprit_and_motive.value: The narrator's alien sister who kills to take over and rule, with the father's apparent approval
culprit_and_motive.quote: he says that he is proud that he sees this then he hears foot steps coming behind him

investigator.value: The narrator (Mimmy), who becomes a ghost and discovers her sister's crimes
investigator.quote: I can now confirm that she is a murderer and that she came to this familly to kill

red_herring.value: Initial suggestion that sister is an alien murderer when narrator is actually the ghost/perpetrator
red_herring.quote: I would love to have a very beautiful emotion and hair color, plus its good to have a very nice helping out friend

social_world.value: Family hierarchy with parents, siblings, and domestic power structures
social_world.quote: my real parents would be dead and I would be alone, plus I would put other people in danger

alibi.value: Sister's whereabouts during violent incidents, narrator tracking her movements
alibi.quote: I seen him leave and how she transformed and I knew that if she can do it so can I

reveal_mechanic.value: Discovery of bloody room with guts and bones revealing true nature of violence
reveal_mechanic.quote: when he opened her room door all you seen was blood, guts and bones

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's trauma from being killed/becoming ghost, seeking revenge against sister
investigator_wound.quote: I can't let any of this stuff happen, not after what she did to me

_meta.title: ebook blackrock hearts starring black day light
